title: Robin Protects Rebecca
description: Pages 15–18 focus on robin protects rebecca, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Gladius, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Robin, Unknown person #5 as cavendish's dangerous alter ego emerges while the fight against the executives grows more unstable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dellin- Ger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You still haven't taken care of the second floor?!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Gladius, what are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm finished over here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Come provide backup for the third floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin is trying to ascend upwards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've got my hands full dealing with Tweedledee and Tweedledum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kyaaa, Roger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That sounds kinda fun, actually!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KyaA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I told you... haah... not to look away...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Geez, you're stubborn aren't'cha, long-arm- tribe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it, that part of your bones sticking up from your shoulder is pretty friggin' weird.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Some guts you've got there...too bad they're all leaking out of that hole that I ripped open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just roll over and die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Mr. Graphic champion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...So, shall we do this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Duty and Honor... are a man's world....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I wouldn't be able to face those that died before me otherwise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Kyaaa, spare me that Mumbo Jumbo... try- ing to act all gallant doesn't fit you at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: If you had just played dead, I would have been willing to let you slide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What good does you standing up serve?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: If I can buy some time... then it serves plenty!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Until straw hat is able to take down Doflamingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I'm going to keep you all from interfering....!!! gphh....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We're all in this together... because in this world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Victory can never be attained alone, kiddo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: So you climb up a pile of sacrifices in order to attain victory? kyahahaha!! Sounds like something you'd do with garbage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: The strong have no need for honor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I'm no ordinary human, either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: YOU'D DO WISE NOT TO UNDER ESTIMATE THE FIGHTING FISH BOODINE.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Third Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Stomp

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Gladius!! I'm here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Where are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Del- linger stay down there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: It's dangerous right now well

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dellin- Ger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: There's some ter- Rifying enemy here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Kyaa, I never thought I'd hear those words from you, Gladius!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: With all of us here together, to even suggest such a terrifying enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: SMIRK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What the- Bay?! What Happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Some scary ass-dude just showed up over by the barrier- Bay-!!!

summary: Robin Protects Rebecca advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Gladius, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
